title: Retro Dead Modpack
description: Retro Dread: A 1.21.4 horror modpack with old Minecraft textures, eerie shaders, ambient sounds, and Herobrine stalking you from the fog.
body:
Retro Dread — A light horror modpack for Minecraft 1.21.4
Retro Dread turns classic Minecraft into quiet terror. With retro‑styled textures, eerie eye motifs, a fog‑heavy shader, and Herobrine stalking from the distance, fear builds slowly until it finally breaks.

Included content
Core horror: Herobrine (From the Fog) Adds Herobrine as a stalking entity that watches, corrupts, and occasionally jumpscares. Loader‑compatible for Fabric on 1.21.4.

Credit: From the Fog by its respective author(s)

Resource pack: EnderEyes_1.21.9_v3.1.zip Ender‑themed textures and motifs that make the world feel watched. Subtle visual cues raise tension without adding extra mobs.

Credit: EnderEyes pack by its respective author(s)

Resource pack: OG MINECRAFT (1).zip Retro‑style textures evoking the old Minecraft look. Rougher, grainier visuals amplify the unsettling vibe.

Credit: OG Minecraft pack by its respective author(s)

Shader: Somber.zip Minimalist, fog‑forward lighting with muted tones, soft shadows, and ambient haze — perfect for slow‑burn horror.

Credit: Somber shader by its respective author(s)

Performance and loader

Fabric API — Core library for Fabric mods

Sodium — Rendering performance

Iris — Shader support

How to enable everything
Resource packs:

Enable: Options → Resource Packs → move “EnderEyes_1.21.9_v3.1” and “OG MINECRAFT (1)” to the active side.

Order tip: Put EnderEyes above OG Minecraft if you want its textures to override.

Shader:

Enable: Options → Video Settings → Shader Packs → select “Somber.zip.”

Credits
From the Fog (Herobrine): respective author(s)

EnderEyes_1.21.9_v3.1: respective author(s)

OG MINECRAFT (1): respective author(s)

Somber shader: respective author(s)

Sodium (CaffeineMC), Iris, Fabric API: respective teams

Modpack curation: RobotYT
